confirm_delete: Haluatko varmasti poistaa tallennuksen "{name}"? (Tämä toiminto on peruuttamaton.)
error_no_source: [ERR_001] Lähdekansio ei ole käytettävissä tai sitä ei ole määritelty.
backup_prompt: Tehdäänkö varmuuskopio nykyisistä tiedostoista kohdekansioon ennen palautusta?
err_001_desc: Source folder is unavailable or the path is invalid.
err_002_desc: Target folder is unavailable or the path is invalid.
err_003_desc: No save is selected in the list.
err_004_desc: The requested save was not found on disk.
err_005_desc: Failed to create the save. Check disk space and permissions.
err_006_desc: Failed to delete the save. It may be in use or locked.
err_007_desc: Failed to restore the save. Target folder may be missing or inaccessible.
err_008_desc: Not enough free disk space to complete the operation.
err_009_desc: File hash mismatch detected during integrity check. The save may be corrupted.
err_010_desc: Metadata file for the selected save was not found.
err_011_desc: The original source path is missing in the metadata record.
err_012_desc: The log file was not found at the expected location.
err_013_desc: The ReadMe file was not found in the application directory.
err_014_desc: Failed to read or write the configuration file.
err_015_desc: Failed to initialize background music playback.
err_016_desc: Failed to create the default application data folders.
err_017_desc: Failed to auto-detect the game source folder.
err_018_desc: An unhandled exception occurred. See the log for details.
err_020_desc: Failed to populate the list of existing saves.
err_021_desc: Failed to open the log file.
err_022_desc: Failed to load language locale files.
